window.setupSplitView = setupSplitView;
window.renderPreview = renderPreview;


// Main application
function _bindEvents() {
        const dom = editorState.dom;

        // Helper to show/hide iframe overlay based on dropdown states
        const updateIframeOverlay = () => {
            const anyDropdownOpen =
                dom.componentDropdown.classList.contains('show') ||
                dom.variantDropdown.classList.contains('show') ||
                (dom.runTestsDropdown && dom.runTestsDropdown.classList.contains('show'));

            if (dom.iframeOverlay) {
                if (anyDropdownOpen) {
                    dom.iframeOverlay.classList.add('active');
                } else {
                    dom.iframeOverlay.classList.remove('active');
                }
            }
        };

        const cta_action = (action_id, payload) => {
            if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                const safePayload = safeClone(payload);
                window.myop_cta_handler(action_id, safePayload);
            } else {
                console.warn("Host function 'myop_cta_handler' is not defined.");
            }

            // Make sure preview buttons are visible in preview tab
            dom.copyCodeBtn2.style.display = 'flex';
            dom.pasteReplaceBtn2.style.display = 'flex';
            dom.previewToggleBtn.style.display = 'flex';
        };

        // Handle chevron click to toggle dropdown
        const componentChevron = document.getElementById('component-chevron');
        if (componentChevron) {
            componentChevron.onclick = (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                const isOpening = !dom.componentDropdown.classList.contains('show');
                dom.componentDropdown.classList.toggle('show');
                dom.variantDropdown.classList.remove('show');
                updateIframeOverlay();

                if (isOpening) {
                    const searchInput = document.getElementById('component-search');
                    if (searchInput) {
                        searchInput.value = '';
                        const items = dom.componentList.querySelectorAll('.modal-dropdown-item');
                        items.forEach(item => item.style.display = 'flex');
                    }
                }
            };
        }

        // Helper function to handle placeholder switching on focus/blur
        const setupPlaceholderSwitch = (inputElement) => {
            if (!inputElement) return;
            const defaultPlaceholder = inputElement.dataset.placeholderDefault;
            const focusPlaceholder = inputElement.dataset.placeholderFocus;

            if (defaultPlaceholder && focusPlaceholder) {
                inputElement.addEventListener('focus', () => {
                    inputElement.placeholder = focusPlaceholder;
                });
                inputElement.addEventListener('blur', () => {
                    inputElement.placeholder = defaultPlaceholder;
                });
            }
        };

        // Setup placeholder switching for editable inputs
        setupPlaceholderSwitch(dom.variantDescriptionDisplay);

        // Handle variant description editing
        const updateVariantDescription = () => {
            if (!editorState.selectedVariant) return;

            const newDescription = dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.value.trim();
            if (newDescription !== editorState.selectedVariant.description) {
                editorState.selectedVariant.description = newDescription;

                // Also update in the versions array
                const version = editorState.versions.find(v => v.id === editorState.selectedVariant.id);
                if (version) {
                    version.description = newDescription;
                }

                _updateButtonStates();

                // Auto-save variant description change
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    const payload = safeClone({
                        version_id: editorState.selectedVariant.id,
                        description: newDescription
                    });
                    window.myop_cta_handler('update_variant_description', payload);
                }
            }
        };

        if (dom.variantDescriptionDisplay) {
            dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.addEventListener('blur', updateVariantDescription);

            dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.addEventListener('input', () => {
                _updateButtonStates();
            });

            dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
                if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    updateVariantDescription();
                    dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.blur();
                } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.value = editorState.selectedVariant ? (editorState.selectedVariant.description || '') : '';
                    dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.blur();
                }
            });
        }

        // Handle variant chevron click to toggle dropdown
        const variantChevron = document.getElementById('variant-chevron');
        if (variantChevron) {
            variantChevron.onclick = (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                const isOpening = !dom.variantDropdown.classList.contains('show');
                dom.variantDropdown.classList.toggle('show');
                dom.componentDropdown.classList.remove('show');
                updateIframeOverlay();

                if (isOpening) {
                    const searchInput = document.getElementById('variant-search');
                    if (searchInput) {
                        searchInput.value = '';
                        const items = dom.variantList.querySelectorAll('.modal-dropdown-item');
                        items.forEach(item => item.style.display = 'flex');
                    }
                }
            };
        }

        // Variant name is read-only in playground - prevent dropdown from opening when clicking
        dom.variantNameDisplay.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
        });

        // Close menus when clicking outside
        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (!e.target.closest('.component-section')) {
                dom.componentDropdown.classList.remove('show');
            }
            if (!e.target.closest('.variant-section')) {
                dom.variantDropdown.classList.remove('show');
            }
            updateIframeOverlay();
        });

        // Close dropdowns when clicking on iframe overlay
        if (dom.iframeOverlay) {
            dom.iframeOverlay.addEventListener('click', () => {
                dom.componentDropdown.classList.remove('show');
                dom.variantDropdown.classList.remove('show');
                if (dom.runTestsDropdown) {
                    dom.runTestsDropdown.classList.remove('show');
                    if (dom.btnRunTestsDropdownToggle) {
                        dom.btnRunTestsDropdownToggle.classList.remove('open');
                    }
                }
                updateIframeOverlay();
            });
        }

        // Close modals when clicking outside (on overlay)
        [dom.addComponentModal, dom.addVariantModal, dom.dtoModal, dom.schemaModal, dom.fixItModal].forEach(modal => {
            if (modal) {
                modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    if (e.target === modal) {
                        modal.style.display = 'none';
                        // Clean up DTO modal state
                        if (modal === dom.dtoModal) {
                            editorState.currentEditingDto = null;
                            dom.dtoNameInput.classList.remove('error');
                        }
                    }
                });
            }
        });

        const variantSearch = document.getElementById('variant-search');
        const variantEmpty = document.getElementById('variant-empty');
        if (variantSearch) {
            variantSearch.oninput = (e) => {
                const searchTerm = e.target.value.toLowerCase();
                const items = dom.variantList.querySelectorAll('.modal-dropdown-item');
                let visibleCount = 0;
                items.forEach(item => {
                    const text = item.textContent.toLowerCase();
                    const isVisible = text.includes(searchTerm);
                    item.style.display = isVisible ? 'flex' : 'none';
                    if (isVisible) visibleCount++;
                });
                if (variantEmpty) {
                    variantEmpty.style.display = visibleCount === 0 ? 'flex' : 'none';
                }
            };
        }

        const componentSearch = document.getElementById('component-search');
        const componentEmpty = document.getElementById('component-empty');
        if (componentSearch) {
            componentSearch.oninput = (e) => {
                const searchTerm = e.target.value.toLowerCase();
                const items = dom.componentList.querySelectorAll('.modal-dropdown-item');
                let visibleCount = 0;
                items.forEach(item => {
                    const text = item.textContent.toLowerCase();
                    const isVisible = text.includes(searchTerm);
                    item.style.display = isVisible ? 'flex' : 'none';
                    if (isVisible) visibleCount++;
                });
                if (componentEmpty) {
                    componentEmpty.style.display = visibleCount === 0 ? 'flex' : 'none';
                }
            };
        }

        // Helper function to create a new variant
        const createNewVariant = () => {
            // Close the variant dropdown
            dom.variantDropdown.classList.remove('show');

            // Calculate the new variant number
            const existingVariantNumbers = editorState.versions
                .map(v => {
                    const match = v.name.match(/^New variant (\d+)$/);
                    return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : 0;
                })
                .filter(n => n > 0);
            const nextNumber = existingVariantNumbers.length > 0 ? Math.max(...existingVariantNumbers) + 1 : 1;
            const newVariantName = `New variant ${nextNumber}`;

            // Create a new variant
            const newVariant = {
                id: 'v' + Date.now(),
                name: newVariantName,
                published: false,
                code: ''
            };

            // Add to the end of versions array (host format: oldest to newest)
            editorState.versions.push(newVariant);

            // Select the new variant
            editorState.selectedVariant = newVariant;

            // Update the UI
            editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.value = newVariantName;
            editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.remove('empty-state');
            editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.setAttribute('contenteditable', 'false');
            editorState.dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.value = newVariant.description || '';

            // Clear the code editor - new variant starts with empty code
            editorState.dom.codeEditor.value = '';
            window.renderPreview();

            // Switch to Code tab for new empty variant
            showTab('code');

            // Refresh the variant list and update button states
            _refreshVariantList();
            _updateButtonStates();

            // Notify the host
            if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                const payload = safeClone({ name: newVariantName });
                window.myop_cta_handler('new_version', payload);
            }
        };

        if (dom.btnAddVariant) {
            dom.btnAddVariant.onclick = createNewVariant;
        }

        // Add variant button (plus icon next to chevron)
        if (dom.addVariantBtn) {
            dom.addVariantBtn.onclick = (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                createNewVariant();
            };
        }
        
        const btnAddComponent = document.getElementById('btn-add-component');
        if (btnAddComponent) {
            btnAddComponent.onclick = () => {
                dom.componentDropdown.classList.remove('show');
                cta_action('new_component', {});
            };
        }

        if (dom.btnNewVariantCancel) {
            dom.btnNewVariantCancel.onclick = () => {
                dom.addVariantModal.style.display = 'none';
            };
        }

        if (dom.btnNewVariantCreate) {
            dom.btnNewVariantCreate.onclick = () => {
                const variantName = dom.newVariantNameInput.value.trim();
                if (variantName) {
                    cta_action('new_version', { name: variantName });
                    dom.addVariantModal.style.display = 'none';
                }
            };
        }

        if (dom.newVariantNameInput) {
            dom.newVariantNameInput.onkeydown = (e) => {
                if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    dom.btnNewVariantCreate.click();
                } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                    dom.addVariantModal.style.display = 'none';
                }
            };
        }

        if (dom.btnNewComponentCancel) {
            dom.btnNewComponentCancel.onclick = () => {
                dom.addComponentModal.style.display = 'none';
            };
        }

        if (dom.btnNewComponentCreate) {
            dom.btnNewComponentCreate.onclick = () => {
                const componentName = dom.newComponentNameInput.value.trim();
                if (componentName) {
                    cta_action('new_component', { name: componentName });
                    dom.addComponentModal.style.display = 'none';
                }
            };
        }

        if (dom.newComponentNameInput) {
            dom.newComponentNameInput.onkeydown = (e) => {
                if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    dom.btnNewComponentCreate.click();
                } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                    dom.addComponentModal.style.display = 'none';
                }
            };
        }

        // Setup tooltip handlers for all buttons
        let tooltipEl = document.getElementById('button-tooltip');
        let tooltipTimeout = null;
        let tooltipShowDelay = null;

        function showTooltip(button, mouseX, mouseY) {
            // Re-fetch tooltip element in case it wasn't available initially
            if (!tooltipEl) {
                tooltipEl = document.getElementById('button-tooltip');
            }
            if (!tooltipEl) return;

            const tooltipText = button.getAttribute('data-tooltip');
            if (!tooltipText) return;

            // For Save and Publish buttons, only show tooltip when disabled
            if ((button === dom.btnSaveTop || button === dom.btnPublishTop) && !button.disabled) return;

            // Clear any existing show delay
            if (tooltipShowDelay) {
                clearTimeout(tooltipShowDelay);
                tooltipShowDelay = null;
            }

            // Delay showing tooltip by 500ms
            tooltipShowDelay = setTimeout(() => {
                tooltipEl.textContent = tooltipText;

                // If mouse coordinates provided, position near cursor
                if (mouseX !== undefined && mouseY !== undefined) {
                    tooltipEl.style.left = mouseX + 'px';
                    tooltipEl.style.top = (mouseY + 16) + 'px';
                    tooltipEl.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
                } else {
                    const rect = button.getBoundingClientRect();
                    // Left-align tooltip with the text inside connect button
                    if (button.id === 'btn-connect') {
                        // Calculate where the centered text starts
                        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                        ctx.font = getComputedStyle(button).font;
                        const actualTextWidth = ctx.measureText(button.textContent).width;
                        const textStartX = rect.left + (rect.width - actualTextWidth) / 2;
                        tooltipEl.style.left = textStartX + 'px';
                        tooltipEl.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
                    } else {
                        tooltipEl.style.left = rect.left + (rect.width / 2) + 'px';
                        tooltipEl.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
                    }
                    tooltipEl.style.top = (rect.bottom + 4) + 'px';
                }

                // Apply different styles based on button
                if (button === dom.btnSaveTop || button === dom.btnPublishTop || button.id === 'btn-connect') {
                    tooltipEl.style.whiteSpace = 'nowrap';
                    tooltipEl.style.maxWidth = 'none';
                } else {
                    tooltipEl.style.whiteSpace = 'normal';
                    tooltipEl.style.maxWidth = '200px';
                }

                tooltipEl.classList.add('show');

                // Auto-hide after 4 seconds
                if (tooltipTimeout) clearTimeout(tooltipTimeout);
                tooltipTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                    hideTooltip();
                }, 4000);
            }, 500);
        }

        function hideTooltip() {
            // Clear show delay if tooltip hasn't appeared yet
            if (tooltipShowDelay) {
                clearTimeout(tooltipShowDelay);
                tooltipShowDelay = null;
            }
            if (tooltipEl) {
                tooltipEl.classList.remove('show');
            }
            if (tooltipTimeout) {
                clearTimeout(tooltipTimeout);
                tooltipTimeout = null;
            }
        }

        // Add tooltip handlers for Save and Publish buttons
        if (dom.btnSaveTop) {
            dom.btnSaveTop.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(dom.btnSaveTop));
            dom.btnSaveTop.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
            dom.btnSaveTop.addEventListener('click', hideTooltip);
        }
        // Setup large publish tooltip for Publish button
        const publishTooltipEl = document.getElementById('publish-tooltip');
        let publishTooltipTimeout = null;
        let publishTooltipShowDelay = null;

        function showPublishTooltip() {
            if (!publishTooltipEl || !dom.btnPublishTop) return;

            // Only show when button is NOT disabled (opposite of regular tooltip)
            if (dom.btnPublishTop.disabled) return;

            // Clear any existing show delay
            if (publishTooltipShowDelay) {
                clearTimeout(publishTooltipShowDelay);
                publishTooltipShowDelay = null;
            }

            // Delay showing tooltip by 500ms
            publishTooltipShowDelay = setTimeout(() => {
                const rect = dom.btnPublishTop.getBoundingClientRect();

                // Position tooltip below the button, with tail pointing to right side of button
                publishTooltipEl.style.top = (rect.bottom + 8) + 'px';
                // Align the right side of the tooltip with the right side of the button
                publishTooltipEl.style.right = (window.innerWidth - rect.right) + 'px';
                publishTooltipEl.style.left = 'auto';

                publishTooltipEl.classList.add('show');

                // Auto-hide after 4 seconds
                if (publishTooltipTimeout) clearTimeout(publishTooltipTimeout);
                publishTooltipTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                    hidePublishTooltip();
                }, 4000);
            }, 500);
        }

        function hidePublishTooltip() {
            // Clear show delay if tooltip hasn't appeared yet
            if (publishTooltipShowDelay) {
                clearTimeout(publishTooltipShowDelay);
                publishTooltipShowDelay = null;
            }
            if (publishTooltipEl) {
                publishTooltipEl.classList.remove('show');
            }
            if (publishTooltipTimeout) {
                clearTimeout(publishTooltipTimeout);
                publishTooltipTimeout = null;
            }
        }

        if (dom.btnPublishTop) {
            dom.btnPublishTop.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                // Show regular tooltip if disabled, otherwise show large publish tooltip
                if (dom.btnPublishTop.disabled) {
                    showTooltip(dom.btnPublishTop);
                } else {
                    showPublishTooltip();
                }
            });
            dom.btnPublishTop.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                hideTooltip();
                hidePublishTooltip();
            });
            dom.btnPublishTop.addEventListener('click', () => {
                hideTooltip();
                hidePublishTooltip();
            });
        }

        // Add tooltip handler for Copy and Share button
        const btnCopyShare = document.getElementById('btn-copy-share');
        if (btnCopyShare) {
            btnCopyShare.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(btnCopyShare));
            btnCopyShare.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
            btnCopyShare.addEventListener('click', () => {
                hideTooltip();

                // Emit CTA to host - host will generate the share URL and copy it
                if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                    window.myop_cta_handler('btn-copy-share', {
                        component_id: editorState.componentId,
                        component_name: editorState.componentName,
                        version_id: editorState.selectedVariant?.id,
                        version_name: editorState.selectedVariant?.name
                    });
                }

                // Show copied state visually
                btnCopyShare.classList.add('copied');
                btnCopyShare.removeAttribute('data-tooltip');

                // Revert back after 2 seconds
                setTimeout(() => {
                    btnCopyShare.classList.remove('copied');
                    btnCopyShare.setAttribute('data-tooltip', 'Copy and Share');
                }, 2000);
            });

        function showCustomTooltip(button) {
            const tooltipText = button.getAttribute('data-tooltip');
            if (!tooltipText) return;

            // Clear any existing show delay
            if (customTooltipShowDelay) {
                clearTimeout(customTooltipShowDelay);
                customTooltipShowDelay = null;
            }

            // Delay showing tooltip by 1 second
            customTooltipShowDelay = setTimeout(() => {
                const rect = button.getBoundingClientRect();
                customTooltipEl.textContent = tooltipText;
                customTooltipEl.style.left = rect.left + 'px';
                customTooltipEl.style.top = (rect.bottom + 8) + 'px';
                customTooltipEl.classList.add('show');

                // Auto-hide after 4 seconds
                if (customTooltipTimeout) clearTimeout(customTooltipTimeout);
                customTooltipTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                    hideCustomTooltip();
                }, 4000);
            }, 500);
        }

            // Clear show delay if tooltip hasn't appeared yet
            if (customTooltipShowDelay) {

                customTooltipShowDelay = null;

        const downloadCode = (button) => {
            const code = dom.codeEditor.value;
            const componentName = editorState.componentName || 'component';
            const variantName = editorState.selectedVariant?.name || 'default';

            // Create filename from component and variant names
            const sanitizeName = (name) => name.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9-_]/g, '_').toLowerCase();
            const filename = `${sanitizeName(componentName)}_${sanitizeName(variantName)}.html`;

            // Create blob and download
            const blob = new Blob([code], { type: 'text/html' });
            const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
            const a = document.createElement('a');
            a.href = url;
            a.download = filename;
            document.body.appendChild(a);
            a.click();
            document.body.removeChild(a);
            URL.revokeObjectURL(url);

            // Show visual feedback
            const originalHTML = button.innerHTML;
            button.innerHTML = `
                <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

                if (!isResizing) return;
                const deltaY = startY - e.clientY;
                const newHeight = Math.min(Math.max(startHeight + deltaY, 60), window.innerHeight * 0.33);
                dom.bottomConsolePanel.style.height = newHeight + 'px';
            };

            const onMouseUp = () => {
                if (!isResizing) return;
                isResizing = false;
                document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
                document.removeEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp);
                dom.bottomConsolePanel.classList.remove('resizing');
                document.body.style.cursor = '';
                document.body.style.userSelect = '';
                // Remove iframe overlay
                if (dom.iframeOverlay) {

            dom.consoleResizeHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {

            });
