        // Update editor content unless preserveEditorContent is true (for unsaved variants)
        if (!data.preserveEditorContent) {
            if (!monacoEditorWrapper) {
                // Monaco not ready yet, set up callback
                window.__monacoReadyCallback = function() {
                    editorState.dom.codeEditor = monacoEditorWrapper;
                    const codeToSet = data.current_version_code || '';
                    editorState.dom.codeEditor.value = codeToSet;
                };
            } else {
                const codeToSet = data.current_version_code || '';
                editorState.dom.codeEditor.value = codeToSet;
            }
        }

        editorState.output_methods_cache = data.output_methods || [];
        editorState.input_methods_cache = data.input_methods || [];
        editorState.versions = data.versions || [];
        editorState.components = data.components || [];
        editorState.firstEnvName = data.firstEnvName || 'QA';
        editorState.firstEnvId = data.firstEnvId || '';
        editorState.releases = data.releases || [];
        editorState.isNewComponent = data.isNewComponent || false;
        editorState.currentVersionId = data.current_version_id;

        // Store original (production) variant code for playground variant switching
        editorState.originalVersionId = data.original_version_id || null;
        editorState.originalVersionCode = data.original_version_code || '';
        editorState.currentVersionCode = data.current_version_code || '';

        // Auto-select the current variant based on current_version_id
        if (editorState.versions.length > 0) {
            // Find the variant that matches the current_version_id
            const currentVariant = editorState.versions.find(v => v.id === data.current_version_id);
            editorState.selectedVariant = currentVariant || editorState.versions[0];

            editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.value = editorState.selectedVariant.name;
            if (editorState.dom.variantDescriptionDisplay) {
                editorState.dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.value = editorState.selectedVariant.description || '';
            }

            // Apply empty-state class if variant name is untitled
            if (editorState.selectedVariant.name === 'Untitled variant') {
                editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.add('empty-state');
            } else {
                editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.remove('empty-state');
            }

            // Variant name is always readonly in playground
            editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.setAttribute('contenteditable', 'false');
        } else {
            editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.value = 'Untitled variant';
            editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.classList.add('empty-state');
            editorState.dom.variantNameDisplay.setAttribute('contenteditable', 'false');
            if (editorState.dom.variantDescriptionDisplay) {
                editorState.dom.variantDescriptionDisplay.value = '';
            }
            editorState.selectedVariant = null;
        }

        _refreshVariantList();
        _refreshComponentList();
        _updateButtonStates();
        _updateEditorReadOnlyState();

        editorState.dom.inputMethodsList.innerHTML = '';
        editorState.input_methods_cache.forEach(method => {
            if (!method.test_dtos) method.test_dtos = [];
            const elem = _createInputMethodElement(method);
            editorState.dom.inputMethodsList.appendChild(elem);
            _refreshTestDtoList(method.method_name);
        });

        editorState.isDirty = false;
        editorState.hasError = false;
        _updateButtonStates();
        _setPreviewMode('desktop');

        // Determine which tab to show based on component state
        // New components or new variants start in code mode
        // Otherwise, preserve the current tab (for refreshes after save)
        if (data.isNewComponent || data.isNewVariant) {
            editorState.activeTab = null;
            showTab('code');
        } else if (!editorState.activeTab) {
            // First load of existing component - show preview
            showTab('preview');
        } else {
            // Preserve current tab, just refresh preview if visible
            if (editorState.activeTab === 'preview' || editorState.activeTab === 'split') {
                window.renderPreview();
            }
        }

        // Run validation every time when loading component
        renderPreview();
    }

    window.myop_cta_handler = (action_id, action_data) => {

        switch(action_id) {
            case 'version_selected':
                mockComponentData.current_version_id = action_data.version_id;
                // Load the code for the selected variant
                const selectedVersion = mockComponentData.versions.find(v => v.id === action_data.version_id);
                if (selectedVersion) {
                    mockComponentData.current_version_code = selectedVersion.code || '';
                }
                // Reload the interface with the selected variant's code
                myop_init_interface(mockComponentData);
                break;
            case 'save_code':
                mockComponentData.component_name = action_data.component_name;
                // Use the version_id from the action_data to find the specific variant
                const currentVersion = mockComponentData.versions.find(v => v.id === action_data.version_id);
                if (currentVersion) {
                    currentVersion.name = action_data.version_name;
                    // Store code in the specific variant
                    currentVersion.code = action_data.code;
                }
                // Update current_version_code to match the saved variant's code
                mockComponentData.current_version_code = action_data.code;
                myop_init_interface(mockComponentData);
                break;
            case 'publish_component':
                break;
            case 'new_version':
                break;
            case 'new_component':
                break;
            case 'test_dto_selected':
                break;
            case 'component_output':
                break;
            case 'toggle_remove_sample_render':
                break;
            case 'update_version_name':
                // Update only the specific variant's name
                const variantToRename = mockComponentData.versions.find(v => v.id === action_data.version_id);
                if (variantToRename) {
                    variantToRename.name = action_data.version_name;
                }
                break;
            case 'update_component_name':
                // Update only the specific component's name
                mockComponentData.component_name = action_data.component_name;
                break;
            case 'update_variant_description':
                // Update the variant's description
                const variantToUpdateDesc = mockComponentData.versions.find(v => v.id === action_data.version_id);
                if (variantToUpdateDesc) {
                    variantToUpdateDesc.description = action_data.description;
                }
                break;
            case 'update_variant_name':
                // Update the variant's name
                const variantToUpdateName = mockComponentData.versions.find(v => v.id === action_data.version_id);
                if (variantToUpdateName) {
                    variantToUpdateName.name = action_data.name;
                }
                break;
            case 'delete_variant':
                // Remove the variant from mockComponentData
                const variantIndex = mockComponentData.versions.findIndex(v => v.id === action_data.version_id);
                if (variantIndex !== -1) {
                    mockComponentData.versions.splice(variantIndex, 1);
                }
                break;
        }

        const findMethod = (methodName) => {
            return mockComponentData.input_methods.find(m => m.method_name === methodName);
        };

        switch(action_id) {
            case 'save_test_dto': {
                const { methodName, dtoName, isNew, newName, dtoData } = action_data;
                const method = findMethod(methodName);
                if (method) {
                    if (isNew) {
                        method.test_dtos.push({ name: newName, data: dtoData });
                    } else {
                        const dto = method.test_dtos.find(d => d.name === dtoName);
                        if (dto) {
                            dto.name = newName;
                            dto.data = dtoData;
                        }
                    }
                    _refreshTestDtoList(methodName);
                }
                break;
            }

            case 'delete_test_dto': {
                const { methodName, dtoName } = action_data;
                const method = findMethod(methodName);
                if (method) {
                    method.test_dtos = method.test_dtos.filter(d => d.name !== dtoName);
                    _refreshTestDtoList(methodName);
                }
                break;
            }

            case 'duplicate_test_dto': {
                const { methodName, newName, dtoData } = action_data;
                const method = findMethod(methodName);
                if (method) {
                    method.test_dtos.push({ name: newName, data: dtoData });
                    _refreshTestDtoList(methodName);
                }
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    const new_ai_prompt = `Fix the following code:
It should be a single plain vanilla Javascript HTML file with no external dependency.
create 2 public global JavaScript methods on the window object.

1. myop_init_interface - it receives the full config object for the whole data of the interface.

2. myop_cta_handler that will receive all the cta calls with the following parameters (action_id,payload). Any action that should be reported back to the application to update data, notification or navigation should be done through this function. It should write the actions to the log and not use the JavaScript alert message`;

    const mockComponentData = {
        component_name: "Signup",
        component_id: "comp-001",
        ai_fix_prompt: new_ai_prompt,
        versions: [
            { id: 'v1', name: 'Default Version', published: true, readonly: true, code: '<div>Default version code - read only</div>', description: 'The original default version' },
            { id: 'v2', name: 'Your Version', published: false, readonly: false, code: '<div>Your version code - editable</div>', description: 'Your editable version' }
        ],
        components: [
            { id: 'comp-001', name: 'Signup' },
            { id: 'comp-002', name: 'Sidebar' },
            { id: 'comp-003', name: 'Header & Insights' },
            { id: 'comp-004', name: 'Table' },
            { id: 'comp-005', name: 'Tree view' },
            { id: 'comp-006', name: 'Cards' },
            { id: 'comp-007', name: 'Analytics' },
            { id: 'comp-008', name: 'Create profile' },
            { id: 'comp-009', name: 'Log out + setting Dialog' },
            { id: 'comp-010', name: 'State control' },
            { id: 'comp-011', name: 'Empty dashboard' },
            { id: 'comp-012', name: 'Chart' },
            { id: 'comp-013', name: 'Add stack' },
            { id: 'comp-014', name: 'Table panel' }
        ],
        current_version_id: 'v2',
        current_version_code: '<div>Your version code - editable</div>',
        input_methods: [
            {
                method_name: "myop_init_interface",
                dto_schema: { "type": "object" },
                remove_sample_render_in_prod: true,
                test_dtos: []
            }
        ],
        output_methods: [
            {
                method_name: "myop_cta_handler",
                dto_schema: {
                    "description": "Called when the user clicks the main CTA.",
                    "cta_id": "string",
                    "cta_payload": "object"
                }
            }
        ]
    };

    // Only initialize with mock data if NOT hosted in iframe (standalone development)
    // When hosted, the parent will call myop_init_interface with real data
    const isHosted = window.parent !== window;
    if (isHosted) {
        // Hide UI until real data arrives
        document.body.classList.add('loading');
    } else {
        myop_init_interface(mockComponentData);
    }

    // Tooltip positioning for status dots and collapsible headers
    document.addEventListener('mouseover', function(e) {
        const statusDot = e.target.closest('.status-dot[data-tooltip]');
        if (statusDot) {
            const rect = statusDot.getBoundingClientRect();
            const tooltip = window.getComputedStyle(statusDot, '::after');

            // Set CSS custom properties for positioning
            statusDot.style.setProperty('--tooltip-top', rect.top + (rect.height / 2) + 'px');
            statusDot.style.setProperty('--tooltip-left', (rect.right + 8) + 'px');
        }

        // Tooltip positioning for collapsible headers
        const collapsibleHeader = e.target.closest('.collapsible-header[data-tooltip]');
        if (collapsibleHeader) {
            const rect = collapsibleHeader.getBoundingClientRect();

            // Position tooltip below the header, aligned to the left
            collapsibleHeader.style.setProperty('--tooltip-top', rect.bottom + 'px');
            collapsibleHeader.style.setProperty('--tooltip-left', rect.left + 'px');
        }

        // Tooltip positioning for View TS Interface link
        const viewTsInterfaceLink = e.target.closest('.view-ts-interface-link[data-tooltip]');
        if (viewTsInterfaceLink) {
            const rect = viewTsInterfaceLink.getBoundingClientRect();

            // Position tooltip below the link, aligned to the left
            viewTsInterfaceLink.style.setProperty('--tooltip-top', rect.bottom + 'px');
            viewTsInterfaceLink.style.setProperty('--tooltip-left', rect.left + 'px');
        }
    });

</script>

</body>
<script id='myop_preview' type="myop_preview">

window.myop_init_interface({});
</script>
